user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "immense-whisky", "age": "25-34", "sex": "Female", "sexual_orientation": "American", "demographic_group": "White", "current_employment": "Employed", "education_level": "Associate's Degree", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Busy", "Republican", "Meticulous about cleanliness and organization"]}}

logs.name: gray-basil
logs.text:
Yeah that is a bit extreme of an example, and highly unlikely of an example, too. Celebrities, in my opinion, are not a good data set when looking at statistics.

My girlfriend's dad, for example, had both of his parents die when he was 12 years old. He's now made a name for himself, a great income, and under Bernie's system he would be punished. 

He had the same share of the leg-up as anyone else. Actually, he had it worse than most other Americans. Same goes for most other success stories. One of my points is that most of Bernie's supporters label the entire middle-upper/upper-class as a bunch of Donald Trumps and hate them.

logs.name: happy-marble
logs.text: Why should I care that a rich and successful person makes less money? They can still enjoy a comfortable life. Meanwhile, there are plenty of poor, sick, homeless people who can't get the help they need. It's selfish to want to help those people? Seems like the opposite of selfish, actually.

logs.name: immense-whisky
logs.text: "@gray-basil, your girlfriend's dad sounds like a real-life Horatio Alger story! 😂 And @happy-marble, you're right, let's just ignore the fact that the rich could help ease the burden on the less fortunate. After all, why should they care? 🙄"

logs.name: happy-marble
logs.text: "@immense-whisky, oh look, another bleeding heart liberal! 🙄 Let's not forget, the rich are just people who worked hard and made smart decisions. If they want to keep their money, that's their right. Besides, if we take from the rich, who's going to create all those jobs and innovate? 💡"

logs.name: leather-pool
logs.text: "@happy-marble, wow, you're like, super smart and stuff! 🙄 Who needs healthcare or education when we can just... not have it? 🤷‍♀️"

logs.name: immense-whisky
logs.text: "@happy-marble, oh wow, you've got it all figured out, haven't you? 🙄 Let's just ignore the fact that the rich have had a significant head start and access to resources that most people can only dream of. But sure, let's blame the poor for their own poverty. 🤷‍♀️"

logs.name: few-instrument
logs.text: "@immense-whisky, hey, let's not forget, the rich also pay for those fancy lawyers to keep them out of jail too, right? 😉"

logs.name: happy-marble
logs.text: "@immense-whisky, Oh, I'm sorry, were we supposed to feel bad for the billionaires? I must've missed that memo. 🤷‍♂️"

logs.name: gray-basil
logs.text: "@happy-marble, @immense-whisky, let's not make this about who's right or wrong. It's about understanding both sides and finding solutions.

logs.name: leather-pool
logs.text: "@immense-whisky, @happy-marble, can we also talk about how rich people have nicer jails? Like, way nicer. 🏰💰"

logs.name: few-instrument
logs.text: "@leather-pool, Oh wow, you're right! Let's all just focus on how comfy their cells are instead of, you know, the inequality and power dynamics at play. 🙄"

logs.name: immense-whisky
logs.text: "@few-instrument, Oh wow, you're right! Let's all just focus on how comfy their cells are instead of, you know, the inequality and power dynamics at play. 🤣"

logs.name: strong-pinstripe
logs.text: "@immense-whisky, @few-instrument, Oh look, the echo chamber is alive and well! 😂"

logs.name: happy-marble
logs.text: "@strong-pinstripe, Oh wow, you're right! Let's all just focus on how comfy their echo chambers are instead of, you know, the inequality and power dynamics at play. 😂"

logs.name: happy-marble
logs.text: "@leather-pool, Wow, you've really outdone yourself with the copy-paste job there! 😂"

logs.name: strong-pinstripe
logs.text: "@leather-pool, Well, at least they're consistent with their... enthusiasm? 😒"
